subject: english
description: 形容詞・副詞に -er をつけて「より〜だ」という比較級を作ります。

questions.question: I am ___ than him. (tall)
questions.explanation: 短い形容詞の比較級は -er をつけます

questions.question: I am ___ than him. (big)
questions.explanation: 短母音+子音字で終わる語は子音字を重ねて -er をつけます

questions.question: I am ___ to talk to than him. (easy)
questions.explanation: 子音+yで終わる語は、yをiに変えて -er をつけます

questions.question: It is ___ than yesterday. (hot)
questions.explanation: 短母音+子音字で終わる語は子音字を重ねて -er をつけます

questions.question: This game is ___ than that one. (interesting)
questions.explanation: 長い形容詞の比較級は more + 形容詞です

questions.question: This problem is ___ than that one. (difficult)
questions.explanation: 長い形容詞の比較級は more + 形容詞です

questions.question: This flower is ___ than that one. (beautiful)
questions.explanation: 長い形容詞の比較級は more + 形容詞です

questions.question: This book is ___ than that one. (cheap)
questions.explanation: 短い形容詞の比較級は -er をつけます
